name: @backspace/desktop
description: Backspace — a self-hosted, open-source chat platform

scripts.dev: mkdir -p build && cp ../../icon.png build/icon.png && bash scripts/gen-icns.sh && cp build/icon.icns $(find ../../node_modules -path '*/electron/dist/Electron.app/Contents/Resources/electron.icns' 2>/dev/null | head -1) 2>/dev/null; tsc && electron .
